consistency_checks: Cart panel explicitly states: "Your cart is empty."
An order panel appears with a specific order ID and "Total charged: $12.50".
No checkout fields (payment/shipping) were presented before the charge message.
Stayed on the same page instead of navigating to a confirmation page.

bug_report.expected_behavior: Clicking Checkout should either proceed to a checkout flow with the current cart contents, or if the cart is empty, prevent checkout. An order should not be charged without a non-empty cart and explicit confirmation.
bug_report.observed_behavior: After clicking Checkout, the page shows an order (ord_1ae75ed0) with "Total charged: $12.50" while the cart simultaneously says it is empty. No payment or confirmation steps were shown.
reproduction_steps: Open the home page of Demo Shop.
Click "Add to cart" on Blue Shockproof Phone Case.
Observe that the cart reads "Your cart is empty" while an order box shows a charged order totaling $12.50 and no checkout steps were presented.
bug_report.title: Order charged despite empty cart and no checkout flow

consistency_checks: Cart panel explicitly states: "Your cart is empty."
An order panel appears with a specific order ID and "Total charged: $12.50".
No checkout fields (payment/shipping) were presented before the charge message.
Stayed on the same page instead of navigating to a confirmation page.
model_decision.observation_summary: On the Products page, the Cart says "Your cart is empty" but an "Order ord_1ae75ed0 — Total charged: $12.50" box appears as if a purchase was completed, without any checkout form or confirmation.
model_decision.reason: A charge appears to have been made even though the cart is empty and no checkout flow occurred, which is inconsistent and risky.
model_decision.reasoning: After adding an item and clicking Checkout, the page still shows an empty cart while simultaneously showing an order with a completed charge. There was no checkout form, no payment or shipping step, and no navigation to an order confirmation page. The state is contradictory: an empty cart should not yield a charged order, and a charged order should reflect a prior non-empty cart and proper checkout flow.
